description_long: This handbag features a semi-circular, rigid body with a smooth, dark exterior finish. The front side displays a keyhole, suggesting a lockable compartment, and is accented by four visible rivets or fasteners at the corners. The handle is a single, arched strap, attached at both ends to the top of the bag, and appears sturdy and fixed in length. The back of the handbag is plain, without any visible embellishments or hardware. The overall design is minimalist and functional, with a focus on durability and security. The surface has a subtle sheen, indicating a polished or treated material.
description: A semi-circular, dark-colored handbag with a single arched handle and a keyhole on the front, featuring a minimalist and sturdy design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the keyhole, four rivets, and the arched handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the bag and the attachment of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, unadorned surface and the handle arch.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bag's thickness and handle attachment.
attribute_strap_type: single fixed-length arched handle, non-adjustable, attached at both ends to the top of the bag
attribute_closure_mechanism: key lock mechanism located on the front center of the bag
